records.ety: [L. allegatio, fr. allegare, allegatum, to send a message, cite; later, to free by giving reasons; ad + legare to send, commission. Cf. Allege and Adlegation.]

defs: The act of alleging or positively asserting.
That which is alleged, asserted, or declared; positive assertion; formal averment
quotes: I thought their allegation but reasonable.

defs: A statement by a party of what he undertakes to prove, -- usually applied to each separate averment; the charge or matter undertaken to be proved.
